title: Crypto market opens 2022 in the red as risk assets retreat
body: Bitcoin and ether slid into the new year as traders braced for a hawkish Federal Reserve, with a broad selloff hitting major altcoins.

title: Hawkish Fed minutes spark sharp crypto selloff
body: Minutes signalling faster rate hikes triggered a plunge across digital assets, with leveraged longs facing heavy liquidation.

title: Kazakhstan unrest knocks Bitcoin hashrate, miners under pressure
body: An internet shutdown amid unrest in a top mining hub weighed on sentiment, adding to the early-January selloff.

title: Risk-off rout deepens as bond yields surge
body: A jump in Treasury yields drove a fresh plunge in crypto, with ether and Solana leading losses in a market-wide selloff.

title: Bitcoin tumbles below key support in heavy liquidation cascade
body: A wave of forced selling sent BTC sharply lower overnight, dragging the wider market into a steep plunge.

title: Layer-1 networks post record developer activity
body: Solana and Avalanche reported strong growth in active developers, fuelling optimism for the smart-contract sector.

title: Major payments firm expands crypto checkout to new markets
body: A global payments provider announced wider merchant adoption of Bitcoin and ether settlement.

title: Executive order seen as constructive for digital-asset regulation
body: Markets rallied on hopes that a coordinated U.S. framework would bring clarity rather than a crackdown.

title: Ethereum testnet merge milestone lifts staking optimism
body: A successful testnet upgrade moved Ethereum closer to proof-of-stake, boosting sentiment around ether.

title: Spot inflows return as Bitcoin reclaims key level
body: Record weekly inflows into crypto investment products signalled renewed institutional appetite.

title: Crypto majors drift lower as momentum fades
body: BTC and ETH gave back gains amid a broad risk-asset selloff into quarter-start.

title: Rate-hike jitters pressure altcoins
body: Avalanche and Solana led declines as traders trimmed risk ahead of inflation data.

title: Tech-stock plunge spills into crypto
body: A sharp drop in equities dragged Bitcoin lower in a correlated selloff.

title: Stablecoin reserves under scrutiny as crypto markets wobble
body: Concerns over the backing of a large algorithmic stablecoin rattled traders as the market sold off ahead of a turbulent week.

title: UST stablecoin slips from dollar peg, traders on edge
body: The TerraUSD (UST) stablecoin briefly lost its dollar peg, raising fears of a depeg spiral that pressured the broader market into a selloff.

title: UST depeg accelerates as billions exit the Anchor protocol
body: A rush of withdrawals deepened the UST depeg, spurring forced selling of reserve Bitcoin and a sharp plunge across crypto.

title: LUNA collapse: Terra token plunges over 90% as depeg spirals
body: Sister token LUNA went into freefall as the UST peg failed, triggering a contagion-driven selloff and mass liquidation across the market.

title: Contagion fears grip crypto as Terra collapse hits altcoins
body: The Terra/LUNA collapse spread fear through the market, with Solana, Avalanche and ether plunging on contagion worries.

title: Terra blockchain halted as LUNA goes near-zero
body: Validators halted the Terra chain after LUNA's collapse, cementing one of crypto's largest-ever wipeouts and a sweeping liquidation cascade.

title: Stablecoin contagion: another dollar token wobbles amid Terra fallout
body: A second stablecoin briefly lost its peg as the Terra contagion spread, keeping the market in selloff mode.

title: Crypto nurses losses after Terra wipeout
body: Markets stabilised tentatively after the LUNA collapse, though sentiment remained fragile.

title: Renewed selloff as Terra fallout shakes confidence
body: Lingering contagion fears from the Terra collapse drove a fresh plunge in altcoins.

title: Lawmakers open probe into stablecoin collapse
body: Regulators signalled tougher oversight following the UST depeg and LUNA collapse, weighing on sentiment.

title: Crypto lenders face liquidity strain as markets slide
body: Speculation over stressed lending desks pressured the market lower in a broad selloff.

title: Celsius halts withdrawals, citing extreme market conditions
body: Lending platform Celsius froze customer withdrawals, sparking panic and a sharp plunge across crypto on contagion fears.

title: Celsius freeze triggers contagion selloff; Bitcoin plunges
body: The Celsius withdrawal freeze drove a market-wide selloff as fears of a liquidity crisis spread.

title: Hedge fund 3AC faces insolvency as liquidations mount
body: Three Arrows Capital was reported near insolvency after failing to meet margin calls, deepening contagion and forced liquidation.

title: Bitcoin slides under $20k as 3AC contagion spreads
body: Crypto extended its plunge as the unwinding of 3AC's positions hit lenders and exchanges.

title: 3AC ordered into liquidation as contagion claims more lenders
body: A court ordered Three Arrows Capital liquidated, intensifying the selloff as exposed firms disclosed losses.

title: Crypto wobbles as recession fears persist
body: BTC and ETH slipped in a cautious, low-volume selloff amid macro uncertainty.

title: Ethereum merge timeline lifts sentiment
body: Developers reaffirmed a September target for the Merge, sparking a relief rally in ether.

title: Stablecoin issuer publishes attestation amid recovery
body: Improved transparency from a major stablecoin helped steady the market after a brutal quarter.

title: Adoption optimism builds as asset manager files for crypto fund
body: A large asset manager's filing fuelled hopes of broader institutional access, lifting prices.

title: Cooler inflation print sparks crypto rally
body: Softer CPI data drove a sharp rally across digital assets.

title: Crypto reverses gains in sudden selloff
body: A hawkish shift in rate expectations triggered a plunge that erased the month's rally.

title: Leverage flush sends Bitcoin sharply lower
body: A cascade of liquidation hit overextended longs, driving a steep selloff.

title: Solana wallet exploit drains funds, sentiment sours
body: A wallet-connected hack drained user funds on Solana, adding to a risk-off selloff across the market.

title: Ethereum prepares for historic Merge upgrade
body: Anticipation built ahead of Ethereum's switch to proof-of-stake, with traders positioning for the upgrade.

title: Hot inflation data slams crypto in broad selloff
body: An upside inflation surprise drove a sharp plunge across risk assets, dragging crypto lower.

title: Ethereum completes the Merge to proof-of-stake
body: Ethereum successfully transitioned to proof-of-stake, a milestone upgrade hailed as a major technical achievement.

title: Institutional custody expansion signals adoption
body: A major bank widened its digital-asset custody service, a constructive sign for the sector.

title: Bitcoin holds steady as volatility ebbs
body: BTC traded in a tight range as realised volatility fell to multi-month lows.

title: Payments giant pilots stablecoin settlement
body: A pilot for on-chain settlement boosted optimism around real-world crypto adoption.

title: Crypto rallies on softening rate expectations
body: Hopes of a Fed pivot drove a broad rally led by ether and Solana.

title: Report questions FTX-affiliated balance sheet, traders uneasy
body: A report raising doubts about the balance sheet of a top exchange's affiliated trading firm stoked unease and early selling.

title: Binance to sell FTX token holdings, sparking selloff
body: A rival exchange said it would offload its FTT holdings, triggering a sharp selloff and renewed solvency fears across crypto.

title: FTX halts withdrawals amid liquidity crunch, contagion fears mount
body: Exchange FTX froze customer withdrawals as a liquidity crisis spiralled, driving a market-wide plunge on contagion fears.

title: FTX rescue deal collapses; Solana plunges on exposure
body: A bailout for FTX fell apart, sending Solana and the broader market into a steep selloff over insolvency fears.

title: FTX files for bankruptcy as contagion spreads to lenders
body: FTX filed for bankruptcy and its CEO resigned, with contagion engulfing exposed lenders and a sweeping liquidation across crypto.

title: Crypto lender halts withdrawals citing FTX contagion
body: Another lending platform froze withdrawals as the FTX collapse rippled through the industry.

title: Genesis-style liquidity strain deepens FTX contagion selloff
body: Fresh signs of distress at a major trading desk extended the FTX-driven plunge across the market.

title: Regulators widen probe into FTX collapse
body: Authorities expanded an investigation and signalled a crackdown following the exchange's insolvency.

title: Crypto subdued as FTX fallout lingers
body: Trading volumes stayed thin as the market digested the fallout from the FTX bankruptcy.

title: Renewed selloff as exchange-reserve fears resurface
body: Worries over exchange solvency drove a fresh plunge, with traders pulling funds amid contagion concerns.

title: Hawkish Fed adds to crypto selloff
body: A hawkish central-bank message compounded losses in an already fragile market.

title: Year-end positioning steadies crypto
body: Markets stabilised into year-end after a punishing 2022.

title: Bitcoin rallies as recovery gathers pace
body: BTC posted its best week in months as risk appetite returned to crypto.

title: Record inflows into digital-asset funds signal renewed demand
body: Investment products saw their largest weekly inflows in over a year.

title: Ethereum staking upgrade nears as testnet succeeds
body: A successful testnet for the Shanghai upgrade lifted optimism around ETH staking withdrawals.

title: SEC action against staking service rattles market
body: A regulatory crackdown on a major exchange's staking program sparked a selloff and fresh compliance fears.

title: Adoption milestone: major retailer pilots crypto payments
body: A large retailer began accepting Bitcoin and ether, a constructive sign for adoption.

title: Stablecoin wobble as banking stress hits crypto
body: A regional-bank scare drove a stablecoin briefly off its peg, pressuring the market into a selloff.

title: USDC briefly depegs as banking crisis spreads
body: A stablecoin lost its dollar peg after exposure to a failed bank, sparking a depeg scare and contagion fears before recovering.

title: Bitcoin surges as safe-haven narrative builds
body: BTC rallied sharply as investors sought alternatives amid banking turmoil.

title: Ethereum completes Shapella upgrade, enabling staking withdrawals
body: The successful Shapella upgrade unlocked staked ETH withdrawals, a major milestone that boosted sentiment.

title: Crypto pulls back after upgrade rally fades
body: Profit-taking drove a selloff as the post-upgrade rally cooled.

title: Asset manager refiles spot ETF application
body: Renewed spot-ETF filing optimism lifted Bitcoin and the broader market.

title: Crypto slips as macro jitters return
body: BTC and ETH gave back gains in a broad risk-off selloff.

title: Spot ETF optimism lifts Bitcoin
body: A wave of fresh spot-ETF filings fuelled a rally in Bitcoin.

title: SEC sues major exchange, alleging unregistered securities
body: The SEC filed a sweeping lawsuit against a top crypto exchange, naming several tokens and triggering a sharp selloff.

title: Second SEC lawsuit names tokens as securities, market plunges
body: A second SEC complaint against a major exchange deepened the selloff, with Solana and other named tokens plunging.

title: Crypto extends losses as lawsuit contagion spreads
body: Fears of a broader regulatory crackdown drove continued selling across altcoins after the SEC lawsuits.

title: Spot Bitcoin ETF filing from asset-management giant lifts market
body: A high-profile spot Bitcoin ETF application sparked a sharp rally, reviving bullish sentiment.

title: ETF momentum builds as more issuers join the race
body: A flurry of spot-ETF filings drove record optimism and a broad rally.

title: Adoption news: payments network expands stablecoin rails
body: A major payments network widened its stablecoin settlement support, a constructive adoption signal.

title: DeFi total value locked climbs to new high
body: Growth in decentralized finance pushed TVL to a record, signalling healthy on-chain activity.

title: Avalanche announces enterprise subnet partnership
body: A new enterprise partnership boosted optimism around Avalanche's subnet roadmap.

title: Dogecoin community funds new charitable initiative
body: A grassroots campaign drove renewed interest in Dogecoin.

title: BNB Chain rolls out performance upgrade
body: An upgrade improved throughput on BNB Chain, welcomed by developers.

title: Solana network sees rebound in activity
body: On-chain activity on Solana recovered as developers returned post-FTX.

title: Institutional survey shows rising crypto allocation intent
body: A survey found more institutions planning digital-asset allocations this year.

title: Layer-2 adoption accelerates Ethereum scaling
body: Rollup activity surged, easing fees and boosting Ethereum's scaling outlook.

title: Crypto exchange secures new regulatory license
body: A licensing win in a major market lifted sentiment around regulated access.
